partyCharacters.name: Sarian
combatNotes: Carries an heirloom ice axe for close combat.
Shield can improve defense but occupies one hand.
Bear hide armour provides medium protection.

inventory.name: Great Axe
inventory.description: Heirloom ice axe that uses energy prima magic.

inventory.name: Shield
inventory.description: Adds protection but uses one hand.

inventory.name: Medicine Kit (Heavy)
inventory.description: Useful for treatment and travel emergencies.

inventory.name: Random Inventory
inventory.description: Miscellaneous gear not yet fully listed.

notes: Social skills make stealth and intimidation possible outside direct combat.
backstory: A Krockan ranger shaped by wilderness travel and survival.
Carries an heirloom ice axe tied to old family and prima traditions.
Functions as scout, tracker, and ranged hunter for the party.

partyCharacters.name: Yaro
combatNotes: Can heal, banish minor spirits, and work with spirit-based tools.
Better suited to utility and magical problem-solving than direct physical combat.

inventory.name: Enchanted Raven Skull
inventory.description: Uses spirit crystals. Creates an enchanted raven able to follow minor commands, though some abilities are currently limited.

inventory.name: Staff of Minor Banishing
inventory.description: Uses spirit crystals. Can banish minor spiritual beings without fighting them and temporarily seal rifts in the spirit barrier fabric.

inventory.name: Tome of Minor Summoning
inventory.description: Uses spirit crystals. Allows summoning of a minor spirit with the right ingredients but does not grant control over it.

notes: Useful for ritual, support, and supernatural encounters.
backstory: A Scallar scholar of healing, spirits, and forgotten knowledge.
Relies on crystal-powered tools and ritual practice more than brute force.
Often serves as the party's healer and supernatural specialist.

partyCharacters.name: Bo
combatNotes: Can fight with gauntlets in close combat.
Carries a trident for reach and underwater fighting.
Gauntlets can create an air bubble underwater large enough for a small party.

inventory.name: Gauntlets
inventory.description: Can be used in combat and can create an underwater air bubble large enough for a small party.

inventory.name: Trident
inventory.description: Useful for melee combat and underwater encounters.

notes: Blacksmithing may help with repairs, tools, and equipment work.
backstory: A young bearver bear with a strong build and practical courage.
Comfortable in the water and skilled in basic blacksmithing.
His gauntlets make him especially valuable in underwater journeys.
